## Summary

<!-- What does this PR do and why? Link any related issues, e.g. "Closes #12". -->

## Type of change

<!-- Your PR *title* must follow Conventional Commits (e.g. `feat: ...`,
     `fix(reporter): ...`) — it drives the automated release. -->

- [ ] 🐛 Bug fix (`fix:`)
- [ ] ✨ New feature (`feat:`)
- [ ] 📝 Documentation (`docs:`)
- [ ] ♻️ Refactor / chore (`refactor:` / `chore:`)
- [ ] 💥 Breaking change (`!` / `BREAKING CHANGE:`)

## Checklist

- [ ] My PR title follows [Conventional Commits](../docs/COMMIT_CONVENTION.md).
- [ ] `bun run check` passes (lint + format).
- [ ] `bun run test run` passes, and I added/updated tests where relevant.
- [ ] I updated the documentation (README / docs) where relevant.
- [ ] For architecturally significant changes, I added an [ADR](../docs/decisions/README.md).
